ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card (e.g., Duisternis+1, Versterken) */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., Attack, Defense) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card's abilities and effects */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost required to play the card */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the card */,
  "defense_power" INTEGER /* Defense power of the card */,
  "card_effect" TEXT /* Detailed description of the card's effects */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the card's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decks" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the deck */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the deck was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the deck was last updated */,
  "deck_strategy" TEXT /* A brief description of the deck's strategy */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the deck */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Last time the deck was used in a game session */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the deck is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_cards" (
  "deck_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck-card relationship */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the deck */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the card in the deck */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Last time the card was used in a game session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deck_cards_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "times_offered" INTEGER /* Number of times the card is offered in card rewards while listed in a deck */,
  "mean_score_change" REAL /* Mean model score change when the card is removed from a deck */,
  "times_skip_lus" INTEGER /* Number of times removing the card causes the model to skip Lus */,
  "times_take_lus" INTEGER /* Number of times removing the card causes the model to take Lus */,
  "times_played" INTEGER /* Number of times the card was played in game sessions */,
  "times_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of times the card was drawn from the deck */,
  "win_rate_with_card" REAL /* Win rate of the deck when the card is included */,
  "win_rate_without_card" REAL /* Win rate of the deck when the card is not included */,
  "average_turns_played" REAL /* Average number of turns the card was played in a game session */,
  "average_turns_in_deck" REAL /* Average number of turns the card was in the deck but not played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_performance_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, designer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of game sessions the user has played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins the user has achieved */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses the user has experienced */,
  "favorite_deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's favorite deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck used in the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game session (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in minutes */,
  "total_turns" INTEGER /* Total number of turns in the game session */,
  "total_cards_played" INTEGER /* Total number of cards played in the session */,
  "total_mana_spent" INTEGER /* Total mana spent in the session */,
  "session_score" REAL /* Score representing the overall performance in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES decks ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., play card, draw card) */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card involved in the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the action (if applicable) */,
  "health_change" INTEGER /* Change in health (if applicable) */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the preference was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
